segments.text: Long, long ago, when the company used to give all the software we needed and all the computers we
needed, I used to ask my teammates, oh, okay, all that is fine. But what software have you purchased
for personal productivity? When everybody got a phone from the company, I asked them,
did you buy the cover? The scratch proof blast? Did you invest? When the company started giving
that too? I asked them, what apps have you installed? Paid subscriptions? Elevate perhaps?
Until then? I'm going back to the same question. The company gives you a lot of stuff.
What have you done on top of all that to improve your own personal productivity?
What tools have you subscribed for in this age of AI? Or are you just free loading on whatever the
company gives you? Because that is the mark of your intent. So tell me.
